noumenon.esotericism_tinker.substrate.de: The shared point pool used to improve Reception and Tuning.
noumenon.esotericism_tinker.elevation.de: The shared point pool used to improve Sublimation and Investiture.
noumenon.esotericism_tinker.reception.de: How many modifier slots the tool can accept.
Grants noumenal abilities derived from the tool's own definition.
noumenon.esotericism_tinker.tuning.desc: Stabilizes structural load and conflicts between yin and yang.
Grants the tool a snapshot of traits from another tool definition.
modifier.esotericism_tinker.noumenon_cro: Stigmata inscribe the form; the Crown ordains the station.
Uses Substrate and Elevation to grant Reception, Sublimation, Tuning, and Investiture.

The Crown is not donned—it is borne.
